notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Yuki Matsui on the pickoff attempt. Justin Crawford scores.

notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Bryce Johnson out at 2nd. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Justin Crawford steals (8) 2nd base. Justin Crawford to 3rd. Justin Crawford advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Freddy Fermin.
